question: The chart shows the defect rate in production from 2012 to 2018. What is the most appropriate conclusion about the change over this period?

options.A: The defect rate underwent dramatic fluctuations over time
options.B: The defect rate showed only small variations around a similar level
options.C: The defect rate decreased sharply to nearly zero
options.D: The defect rate stayed exactly the same every year

explanation: The y-axis uses a very tight range (3.76–3.96%) instead of a more informative 0–10% context, which visually exaggerates variability. The actual net change is about 0.06% over the period, which is modest in the full context.
